Document:
# Rule 7 - Keep it pg-13
This is a 16+ server, so there are minors here. While you don't have to keep it family friendly, ERP is strictly prohibited.
A good guideline is that if you could see it in a pg-13 movie, then it is likely okay.
## Precedents
- Absolutely no ERP. The occaisonal sex joke or innuendo [bolditalic] MAY [/bolditalic] be fine based on it's content, as long as it is mild. - No Shock content, whether sexual or gory in nature. - Language, as long as it is [textlink="not bigotry" link="RuleBigotry"], is fine however. Feel free to cuss like a sailor!
